title: Story: implement sunrise/sunset local-time band selection in pixooclock

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented adaptive palette core: new clock_palette helper module (location resolution, ipapi cache, real sun window, seasonal timezone fallback) and pixooclock runtime integration with auto mode + periodic band refresh.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Feature commit pushed: 6141163. Implemented adaptive pixooclock palette with --band auto default, day/night bands, lat/lon + env + ipapi cache location resolution, and seasonal timezone fallback.
